description: Best-effort proposed observations and characteristics grouped by first character of data/hash-types filename. These are review proposals only and are not loaded by dahash runtime.

entries.name: Dahua (MD5 Authentication)
accuracy_notes: Add parser validation for separator count and per-field length/alphabet instead of relying only on whole-line regex.
Cross-check Hashcat mode example shape before raising confidence for ambiguous raw hashes.
Promote unique prefix or wrapper match above generic length/alphabet matches.
Use John format label as a tool hint but not as sole runtime identification evidence.

accuracy_notes: Add parser validation for separator count and per-field length/alphabet instead of relying only on whole-line regex.

Raw hex-only forms need context-aware ranking because many algorithms share the same length and alphabet.

entries.name: Django (bcrypt-SHA256)

special_native_output_notes.note: bcrypt values use modular crypt prefixes $2a$, $2b$, $2x$, or $2y$ followed by cost, 22-char salt, and 31-char checksum; application-specific bcrypt variants should validate the wrapper before generic bcrypt.

native_notes.note: bcrypt values use modular crypt prefixes $2a$, $2b$, $2x$, or $2y$ followed by cost, 22-char salt, and 31-char checksum; application-specific bcrypt variants should validate the wrapper before generic bcrypt.

entries.name: Drupal > v7.x

special_native_output_notes.note: Portable PHP password hashes use itoa64 prefixes such as $P$, $H$, and sometimes $S$ depending on application/version; application names improve ranking for otherwise similar phpass strings.
